starCategoryDecisions.researchDecision: no school-manual locator in this pass authorizes a new annual Tứ Hóa dignity gate beyond current V0.8 engineering behavior

requiredDignitySet.description: V0.8 requiresDignity remains an optional binary gate. School-manual miếu/hãm supports conditional treatment for natal mains; not a mandate to expand the required set in this PR.

optionalDignityMultiplier.description: No numeric dignity multiplier is authorized. V0.8 dignifiedStaticPositive is a distinct point class, not a multiplier.

noDignityDependency.description: Many V0.8 rules omit requiresDignity; that remains valid engineering default for rules without source-backed conditions.

schoolSpecificDisagreement.description: Modern Trung Châu-leaning commentary discusses miếu/hãm for lưu niên, but this pack does not treat that as Nam Phái authority (SRC-AA-V09-MODERN-KABALA-LUU prohibited for candidate eligibility).

readinessNote: Dignity policy adjudicated for foundation purposes; no numeric multipliers; does not block SHAPE-AAV09-THIEN-MA-MOVEMENT.
